candidates.why: Recurring finance cost line available across years; best single fallback when granular interest labels are incomplete.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Very strong semantic match to interest expense, but missing in 2025 preview and appears to overlap with total financial expense in other years.

candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but likely already included in broader interest/financial expense lines; using it with totals risks double counting.

Not a finance cost.

candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure, likely duplicate of the main lease-interest line.
Equity line, not finance cost.
Equity line, not finance cost.
Liability balance, not interest expense.
